prompt: The scene opens on a long, cracked concrete walkway lined with a row of rusted metal barriers. These barriers, showing signs of age and neglect, stand against a wall that is heavily damaged, with large patches of its surface peeled away to reveal darker layers beneath. Small green plants have taken root in the cracks of the pavement and around the base of the barriers, adding a touch of life to the otherwise desolate setting. In the background, a staircase ascends into shadow, hinting at a larger, abandoned structure.As the perspective glides forward along the walkway, the camera reveals more of the barriers stretching into the distance, each one identical in its weathered state. The wall continues to show its deterioration, with fissures and peeling paint creating a textured, uneven surface. The ground remains cracked and littered with small debris and scattered fragments of broken concrete. The overall atmosphere is one of quiet abandonment, with the overgrown vegetation and decaying infrastructure suggesting a place long forgotten.
